name: maxtac-source
description: Source and decompiled-code static analysis workflows for MaxTAC research.

interface.shortDescription: SAST, source triage, CFG, and OpenGrep evidence.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Source adds static surface triage, focused control-flow evidence, and OpenGrep rule guidance for source code and decompiled code targets. It is intended to pair with MaxTAC Core and whichever research domain pack owns the target.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Source to triage this authorized source target.
Create a focused MaxTAC Source packet for this route or subsystem.
